series_metadata.series_description: Internal Audit reports are developed after the completion of an audit, internal investigation or performance audit of a division within the Ohio Department of Taxation. These reports document the background, methodology, findings and recommendations made by the Internal Audit Division for each activity performed.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years following the Auditor of State review. ; Electronic: 2 years following the Auditor of State review., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
